mapper.select: SELECT * FROM project_fund_record WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE project_fund_record SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0
mapper.select: SELECT pi.leader_id FROM project_info pi INNER JOIN project_fund_record pf ON pi.id = pf.project_id WHERE pf.id = #{fundId} AND pf.del_flag = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_fund_record f WHERE f.project_id = #{projectId} AND f.del_flag = 0
AND f.status = #{requestDTO.status}

SELECT f.id, f.project_id AS projectId, f.usage_desc AS usageDesc, f.amount, f.applicant_id AS applicantId, f.status, f.create_time AS createTime, u.real_name AS applicantName, (SELECT remark FROM project_audit_log al WHERE al.business_id = f.id AND al.module_type = 2 AND al.action != '提交报销申请' ORDER BY al.create_time DESC LIMIT 1) AS auditRemark FROM project_fund_record f LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON f.applicant_id = u.id WHERE f.project_id = #{projectId} AND f.del_flag = 0
AND f.status = #{requestDTO.status}
ORDER BY
f.amount
f.create_time
f.create_time
ASC
DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
